hypothesis: The shared product-family shell should satisfy desktop, tablet, and mobile limiting cases without overflow or clipped authority rows.
summary: Current `/work/ft` responsive evidence still fails the laptop limiting case with horizontal overflow and multiple shared-shell overflow culprits.
recommendation: Do not promote `/work/ft` while the laptop limiting case overflows. Repair the shared work-lane shell and rerun responsive falsification.
next_hypothesis: Tighten shared authority-row containment and source-file metric sizing so the FT laptop shell stops exceeding the page width.
learning_captured: FT already had a blocking breakpoint failure but no explicit route gap, so integration truth stayed too optimistic.
known_risks: The current responsive report is shared across routes, so the supporting evidence still carries shared-artifact contamination risk.
